g.text: Offline Download Manager for Social Media App (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "User saves a reel for offline. Manager queues it, picks download strategy, downloads, retries on failure, notifies user."
STEP 3 - DownloadTask is the central object.
: user paused or network lost, can resume.
(e.g., 3 at a time). When one finishes,
STEP 6 - How to actually download? (KEY STEP)
with resume support — for large videos.
"Social media app — user moves from WiFi
pause all downloads when WiFi lost.
STEP 8 - Where does it go? Storage is finite.
bar in the downloads screen (% + speed).
"User saves a reel -> DownloadManager queues it with
priority -> Queue pops it when slot opens -> StrategySelector picks
ChunkedDownload for video on WiFi -> Download progresses, observer
updates UI -> Network drops? AutoPauseHandler pauses, resumes on
reconnect -> Failure? ExponentialBackoff retries -> Storage full?
LRU eviction frees space -> Complete: file saved, user notified.
DownloadRequest: content type, URL, quality preference
DownloadTask created with state, progress, priority
Network lost: auto-pause. WiFi back: auto-resume. Quality adapts
Storage full: LRU / SizeBased / OldestFirst eviction
Failure: exponential backoff retry, resume from last byte
UI progress bar, notification bar, analytics all updated
